name: Multi-Page PDF
description: Build a multi-page PDF — a cover, flowing content blocks, and a back page.

aspectWarning.message: This document is built for portrait pages. A landscape or wider size breaks the two-column layout — keep height the longer side.

inputs.label: Page size
inputs.help: Sets every page's size and the exported PDF page size. Each page in the document renders at exactly this size.

inputs.label: Light / dark style
inputs.help: Sets the light or dark treatment (text and logo) for both the cover and the back page.

inputs.label: Accent colour
inputs.help: Used for the cover band, headings and rules.

inputs.label: Subtitle
inputs.default: A summer of building in the open

inputs.label: Cover text
inputs.default:
Prepared for internal review.

**Confidential** — not for distribution.

inputs.label: Logo
inputs.help: Your logo for the cover. Leave empty to use the SUSE logo.

inputs.label: Cover image
inputs.help: Optional hero image filling the top of the cover.

inputs.label: Cover background
inputs.help: Custom background colour for the cover. Leave empty to use the cover style default.

inputs.label: Content blocks
inputs.help: Each block flows onto the pages between the cover and back page. A block sits in one column by default; set it to Wide to span both columns. New pages are created automatically as blocks fill up.

fields.label: Body
fields.placeholder: Body text — supports **bold**, *italic* and - bullet lists

default.heading: Introduction
default.body:
Welcome. This document was generated from a handful of simple inputs — a title, some text blocks, and a couple of images.

Each block flows onto the pages automatically. There is no page-by-page layout to manage: add blocks and the pages appear as they fill.

default.heading: On brand by default
default.body:
Headings, rules and the cover band all use your **accent colour**. Body text supports *italic*, **bold** and bullet lists:

- One source of truth
- Consistent typography
- Export-ready PDF

default.heading: Column or wide
default.body: A block sits in a single column by default. Switch any block to *Wide* and it spans both columns — useful for an opening paragraph, a pull quote, or a full-width image.

default.heading: Set the height
default.body: Leave a block on **Auto** to size it to its content, or pin it to Short / Medium / Tall / Full so the grid stays tidy.

default.heading: Add as much as you like
default.body: When the blocks outgrow a page, the next page is created for you. The back page always comes last.

inputs.label: Back background
inputs.help: Custom background colour for the back page. Leave empty to use the cover style default.

inputs.label: Text
inputs.default: Thanks for reading. Reach out for source files, templates and guidelines.

inputs.label: About text
inputs.default: SUSE is a global leader of enterprise open source software. By transforming community innovations into secure, sovereign and AI-ready solutions, SUSE empowers customers to escape vendor lock-in and regain control of their IT destiny. Through industry-leading Linux, Kubernetes, Edge and AI infrastructure solutions, SUSE delivers the flexibility to innovate everywhere—from the data center to multi-cloud and out to the edge. Only SUSE also manages many Linux and Kubernetes distributions. At SUSE, Choice Happens because we prioritize community, interoperability and relentless innovation. Discover how we power mission-critical resilience at www.suse.com
inputs.help: Shown beneath the contact details on the back page.

inputs.label: Back image
inputs.help: Optional image along the top of the back page.
